_comment: SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for the QAIRT SDK release the build/setup tooling targets by default. To bump the QAIRT version, change ONLY the fields below; all active code, setup scripts, and tests derive their default version from this file. Consumers: scripts/qairt_version.py (Python), Setup.bat / Uninstall.bat (PowerShell JSON parse). Docs/comments use the placeholder '<QAIRT SDK version>' and are intentionally NOT auto-synced (they are historical verification notes).
